reject_reason: plan-drafter-04.complete.json missing constraints_honored field entirely (no self-attestation of forge:planning skill invocation), unlike plan-drafter-05 and plan-drafter-06 which both explicitly list 'forge:planning skill invoked'. Cross-referenced pre-spawn record plan-drafter-04.json shows the skill WAS instructed ('special_execution_constraints' item 1), and Plan 04's structure strongly resembles forge:planning output, but per lesson #9/#11/#C2 (不信推理信实证) structural resemblance cannot substitute for marker self-attestation. Flagged in packet §9/§11, not hidden.
